name: pcsx2-nightly
description: PCSX2 is a free and open-source PlayStation 2 (PS2) emulator, using a combination of MIPS CPU Interpreters, Recompilers and a Virtual Machine which manages hardware states and PS2 system memory. This allows you to play PS2 games on your PC, with many additional features and benefits. This is the nightly version.
